raw_input:
[5.0/5] GREAT BUY I LOVE THIS SET IT MAKES MY HAIR SMELL SO GOOD AND IT IS REALLY SOFT AND SEEMS LIKE IT IS STARTING TO WORK I RECIEVED THIS PRODUCT AT A DISCOUNTED COST FOR MY HONEST OPINION AND REVIEW [5.0/5] 5 Drops Will Do Ya This is a very nice hair serum that is targeted at encouraging and speeding up hair growth. The first ingredent, and therefore the most prevalent ingredient, is a type of silicone. Silicone has become the most popular ingredient for anti-friz and shine serums for hair, not to mention a whole world of cosmetics like oil free moisturizers and foundations. It has a slip to it, which gives silicone the *feeling of being like an oil, but it is by its nature, is totally oil free. And of course, also by its nature, it cannot clog pores or follicles. Infact, the Dae Long Hair Growth Serum formula contains three different types of silicone as its first three ingredients. The active ingredients in the product, or the ingredients that actually enable the product to do its job of encouraging hair growth, are Jojoba Oil, Macadamia Nut Oil, Lupine Protein, and Panax Ginseng. These nourish and stimulate the hair follicles to remain longer in the anagen, or hair growing phase, and to produce healthier, stronger hair from the root. Jojoba oil is a skin compatible oil, meaning that it cannot and does not clog pores or follicles, closely resembles the body's own natural lubrication, and can be absorbed by human hair, skin, and nails. There is also extract of Macadamia Nut Oil, which moisturizes the hair cuticle and shaft and helps to prevent hair breakage and split ends. Hydrolyzed protein from the seeds of the lupine plant are very high in protein and contain 35-45% of all the essential amino acids. Panax ginseng is an extract from the panax ginger root and has nourishing and stimulating qualities that directly feed and nourish the hair follicle. I was fortunate to be able to order this product at a discounted rate in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. I have used a great many hair serums and products to stimulate growth of stronger, longer, and healthier hair. One of my favorite things about this Dae Long Hair Growth Serum is that it has a very pleasant fragrance! I also really like that the ingredient list is simple, straightforward, and does not contain weird chemicals or scary preservatives!!! It has a very clean feel to it, not leaving your hair greasy at the last part that you want to be greasy, the roots. A few drops goes a long way I say five drops will do. While pleasant, It is also important not to over do it!. I have very, very sensitive skin and had no problem at all with this. Time will tell how much it makes the hair grow. I am also taking a good hair, skin & nails vitamin because as a Licensed Esthetician, I know for a fact that you have to feed and nourish INSIDE AS WELL AS OUTSIDE in order to truly grow longer, stronger, and healthier hair!! [2.0/5] Unfortunately, the serum is too heavy for my hair ... Unfortunately, the serum is too heavy for my hair. It makes it look weighed down and greasy, rather than adding any volume. [1.0/5] No. Don't do it This is a waste of time and money [5.0/5] Five Stars The serum makes my hair looks full hair-volume. It also makes my hair soft. [3.0/5] I really really like the DAELONG products I have been using the serum for a little over 3 weeks. I really really like the DAELONG products. Take a look at my other review of the hair treatment. It’s absolutely amazing. However, the quick grow serum didn’t work for me. Its consistency was too watery for my taste. You can definitely tell it has argan oil in it. There is something else in this product that causes it to be a little soapy if you apply more than 3 squirts.

I usually apply this product to freshly washed, but dry hair. Just to allow it to have its full effect. I also applied it nightly and something during the day if I remembered before work. I did not lose any more hair while using this product but I also didn’t gain any hair as well. I wish I would’ve taken some pictures to really be sure that I haven’t had hair growth but I watch for growth every day. I can guarantee I am pretty sure. I like products with a thicker consistency so what works for me may not work for you. I have very thick no porosity hair.

I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. [5.0/5] Five Stars Results are seen inmediately! [5.0/5] Very impressive for wavy/curly hair My hair is naturally wavy/curly and tends to be dry and on the frizzy side. I don't use heat tools other than for special occasions. It's also on the fine thin side. I have the length I want, it goes to the middle of my back, but i'm looking for something to help with making it thicker. I don't know if this product will help with that but willing to give it a try. It does say that it will make it fuller so that gives me hope. I have tried probably every hair care product there is from cheap to expensive. I have found some that i'm more pleased with then others.
So now the selling points of this product are:
~This serum will stimulate hair growth at an impressive speed; just after 1-2 weeks of usage your hair will start getting longer and fuller!
~The enriched formula of this serum will nourish your roots and follicles deeply, helping your hair become denser, fuller and stronger.
~This serum will offer deep moisture to your hair, making it look healthy and glowing. Your hair will soon be silky soft and tempting to the touch! Forget dry, frizzy hair once and for all.
~ Just 5-6 drops of this amazing serum will rejuvenate your hair, making look it good when you don't have time to wash.
My honest and unbiased opinion for the discount price I paid for this serum:
The fragrance is a light soft scent which I like alot. The serum is light and easy to apply to the scalp. I pump 2 drops on my finger tips and massage in a section of my scalp. Repeating this till my entire scalp is massaged. I also use it on the length of my hair to tame the frizz. Just 4 or 5 drops in palms and smoothed down the length of hair is all is needed. I am very impressed with this serum. I have been using it for a week. No noticeable growth or fullness yet but the texture of my hair is so much smoother and noticeably less frizz. Some reviewers have stated it made their hair greasy feeling. Maybe they used to much or have straight hair. Curly wavy hair is drier due to the natural oils from the scalp can not travel down the hair shaft like straight hair. I am very pleased with this product! [4.0/5] Requires dedication. This is different from every hair product I have used in my life. It smells good, a bit like men's cologne, not in anyway overwhelming. I have heard from beauticians that massaging the scalp in daily intervals helps stimulate hair growth. So I do believe this has the potential to work as long as you follow the instructions and do it it consistently for 2 weeks. I would love to tell you the results but it has been 2 weeks and I suck at sticking to a schedule in the evening. So I have only used it once a day if that for the last 2 weeks. It is not sticky or oily. The consistency is kind of like diluted gel, if that makes sense. Kind of like thick water.
If you found this review helpful please let me know. Thank you [5.0/5] Soft and Silky Hair I have been using this product for some time now and I can say it is a smaller container than I expected but it is because you only need a small amount for your hair. I put this product on after I shower and it makes my hair not only detangle but silky smooth. I feel my hair has gotten healthier after six months of breast feeding my little girl. I would definitely reccomend this to anyone with dry and damaged hair like mine.

DISCLOSURE*** I received this item for free or discounted to give an honest and unbiased review. I was not paid or compensated to give a rating or to even review the product. I do not have a relationship with seller, vendor or manufacturer. I give ratings based on my experience and expected performance with a product and not what the seller wants me to put. My first impression is based upon my testing of this product. This is my opinion AND I only change my rating if the product under performs or breaks over time. I am disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission 16 CFR Part 255: Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsement and Testimonials in Advertising. [4.0/5] Daelong I just received the product a few days ago and just started using it. I will get back with a review in a few weeks to see if this product stands by it's name. It doesn't have an odor and I do like that
Ok I am back with my second review. It has been over 3 months now since I have been using this product. It has grown my hair and most of all thickened it. I will most likely keep using this product simply because it does work. It literally took 3 months for me to see the difference when on the bottle it says 2 weeks of hair growth. Did not happen. But overall I do like the product. [3.0/5] I've only been using this product for a week now ... I've only been using this product for a week now. Not long enough yet to really give a full review. But so far I have noticed my hair is shinier, softer & looks healthier overall! I will continue to use & give an updated review after more use of this product. [3.0/5] Three Stars Using product for 3 weeks, it's showing very little progress. Will continue to use and see mir results. [4.0/5] It works guy! I was excited to get my product when I received it in the mail. I was a bit skeptical at first when I received it because it said that it would help my hair grow so much within a couple of weeks. My hair texture is naturally wavy and coarse. I have dry hair most of the time, so I am constantly trying to find a product that will moisturize my scalp. I also noticed my hair sheds more as I have experienced thinning around the front of my hairline because of overheating.
When I used this product I noticed my hair was not shedding as much as it did before and I was slowly gaining restored length over the weeks. My hair has improved in shine and has a more radiant, healthier look. I have seen an improvement with moisture co'nsistency, hair length, and volume. My hair in the weeks of use has improved, and I am glad to have been able to review this product. [5.0/5] I've been using it for a week now and I ... I've been using it for a week now and I can definitely see improvement on my hair. It really works!

response:
Mixed reviews for hair growth serum. Most buyers happy, few not.

GOOD: Many say hair softer, shinier, healthier looking. Some report noticeable growth and fullness within 1-2 weeks. Fragrance popular, described light and pleasant. Works well for curly wavy dry hair types. Small amount needed per use. Key ingredients include Jojoba Oil, Macadamia Nut Oil, Lupine Protein, Panax Ginseng. Formula silicone-based, oil-free, no harsh chemicals.

BAD: Few buyers say serum too heavy, makes hair greasy and weighed down. One called complete waste. Some find consistency too watery. Can feel slightly sticky or oily. One buyer saw no growth after weeks of use.

NEUTRAL: Results take time, need consistent use. Works better for dry curly hair than straight hair. Several reviewers received product at discount in exchange for review.
